landing.tagline: A quiet, respectful space to honor loved ones.

login.heading: Cloudyard
login.signInSubtext: Sign in to manage your memorials
login.confirmationSent: We've sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click the link to activate your account.
login.checkSpam: Also check your spam folder if you don't see the email.

invite.acceptedText: You now have editor access to this memorial.
invite.loginRequiredText: Please sign in or create an account to accept this invitation.
invite.errorWrongEmail: This invitation was sent to {email}. Please sign in with that email.
invite.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
invite.wrongAccountText: This invitation was sent to a different email address than the one you're currently signed in with.

authErrors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email address first. Check your inbox.
authErrors.userExists: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in.
authErrors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
authErrors.passwordWeak: This password is too weak. Please choose a stronger one.
authErrors.passwordSame: The new password must be different from the old one.
authErrors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
authErrors.linkExpired: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
authErrors.userNotFound: No account found with this email address.
authErrors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
authErrors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.

forgotPassword.heading: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtext: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset it.
forgotPassword.sentTo: We've sent a reset link to {email}. Click the link to choose a new password.
forgotPassword.checkSpam: Also check your spam folder if you don't see the email.

resetPassword.heading: New password
resetPassword.subtext: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
resetPassword.errorInvalidLink: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

visit.heading: Visit a Memorial
visit.description: Enter the link or name of the memorial.
visit.linkHelper: You can find the link in your invitation or from the creator.
visit.privateHint: Private memorials are only accessible via shared links.
visit.errorRequired: Please enter a link or name.
visit.errorNotFound: No memorial found. Please check the link.

dashboard.creator: Creator
dashboard.emptySubtitle: Start preserving memories of someone special.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.pendingStoriesOne: 1 new story is waiting for your approval. Check it in edit mode.
inbox.pendingStoriesMany: {count} new stories are waiting for your approval. Check them in edit mode.

stories.heading: Write a story
stories.subtext: Share your personal memory. The creator will review it before publishing.
stories.moderationHint: Will be published after approval by the creator
stories.pendingNotice: Your story will be reviewed by the creator and then published.
stories.editHint: Mark favourites with ⭐ for Highlights. Long-press to delete.

gallery.heading: Gallery
gallery.editHint: Mark favourites with ⭐ for Highlights. Long-press to delete.

save.signInHint: to save memorials to your collection.

request.title: Send a suggestion
request.signInHint: to send suggestions to the creator.
request.subtext: Have an idea or change? Write to the creator.

create.placeholderQuote: e.g., In the end, it's not the years in your life that count...
create.confirmIntro: Please make sure that the creation of this memorial is in the spirit of the deceased person.
create.confirmFamily: If this is not a public figure, the creation should — where possible — be done in agreement with the closest relatives.
create.confirmRespect: Take care to keep all content respectful, truthful, and dignified.
create.confirmSensitive: Do not publish sensitive or personal information without proper authorization.
create.confirmClosing: This place is meant for honoring remembrance. Please treat it with the care and respect it deserves.
create.confirmCheckbox: I have read and understood these guidelines
create.privateConfirmDesc: Only people with the direct link will be able to view this memorial. It will no longer appear in search results.
create.publicConfirmDesc: Your memorial will be visible to everyone and can be found via search.
create.errorNameExists: A memorial with this name already exists. Try a slightly different name.
create.errorSaveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.
create.errorYearTitle: Please enter at least a Year and Title.
create.galleryHint: Mark favourites with ⭐ for Highlights. Long-press to delete.
create.storiesDescription: Let visitors share memories. Mark favourites with ⭐ for Highlights.
create.teamDescription: Invite people by email to edit this memorial.
create.leaveRoleDesc: You will lose editor access to this memorial. This cannot be undone without a new invitation.

pricing.heading: Choose your plan
pricing.subtext: Honor your loved ones — start free, upgrade anytime.

paywall.sizeLimit: You've reached the 30 MB storage limit.
paywall.comingSoon: Premium is coming soon with unlimited photos, videos and more.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.controllerAddress: Gymian.ai GmbH, Im Mediapark 5, 50670 Cologne, Germany
datenschutz.dataText: Name, email address, training data, technical access data
datenschutz.purposeText: To provide the Gymian app (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR)

demo.bio: Sarah was a loving mother, grandmother, and biological researcher who dedicated her life to preserving wetland ecosystems. Her gentleness and wisdom touched everyone she met.
demo.quote: Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
demo.story1Text: Mom always loved the rain. She used to say it was the earth taking a deep breath.
demo.story2Text: I worked with Sarah for 20 years. Her patience was unmatched.
demo.photo1Caption: Walking in the Olympic National Park, 1985
demo.photo2Caption: Her favorite view of the valley
demo.timeline1Desc: Born in Portland, Oregon to Robert and Mary Williams.
demo.timeline2Desc: Earned degree in Biology from University of Washington.
demo.timeline3Desc: Met David at a research conference. Married two years later.
demo.timeline4Desc: Her work on local wetlands was featured in Nature magazine.
demo.supportDesc: Sarah dedicated her life to conservation. In lieu of flowers, the family suggests supporting her favorite causes.
